commit_scope: Embody nature-taught trust as a core concept plus executable Form recipes. The nature-trust cell reads relationship behavior the way living systems do: repeated non-harm, reciprocity, boundary response, repair, diversity, rest, local attention, and whole-field vitality after contact. The cell-importance layer composes that trust posture with identity, boundary, vitality, need, offering, memory, and field fit so a cell can open, watch, wait, repair, rest, or ask.
evidence_refs: Form-first route attempted in this thread with bounded form-cli ask; the initial local ask path timed out/missed, so source grounding used direct body search over existing concepts and stdlib rows.

External critique requested by the user ran through the local Grok CLI in non-interactive prompt-file mode. Gemini CLI required OAuth and exited; Claude CLI exceeded the configured budget caps before producing review output.
Grok critique identified that diversity/rest should gate trust-earned rather than only field vitality; the recipe and band now make missing diversity/rest resolve to wait rather than watch.
The Nature-Taught Trust concept page names the current nature-trust-band verdict as 16383, matching the executable fourth-arm proof.

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nature-trust.fk form-stdlib/tests/nature-trust-band.fk -> '✓ core.fk+nature-trust.fk+nature-trust-band.fk  → 16383' and 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' with '1 ok, 0 divergent'.

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nature-trust.fk form-stdlib/cell-importance.fk form-stdlib/tests/cell-importance-band.fk -> '✓ core.fk+nature-trust.fk+cell-importance.fk+cell-importance-band.fk  → 2047' and 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' with '1 ok, 0 divergent'.
python3 scripts/wellness_check.py -> exit 0; vision-kb/INDEX.md aligned at 194 concepts; edited durable docs speak from what IS; no unseen structural twins.
python3 scripts/generate_repo_indexes.py --check -> All indexes up to date.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nature-trust.fk form-stdlib/cell-importance.fk form-stdlib/tests/cell-importance-band.fk
local_validation.notes: The nature-trust Form recipe and band prove four-way locally at verdict 16383. The cell-importance recipe and band prove four-way locally at verdict 2047. The proof now encodes: fail any behavior signal -> wait; pass behavior without vitality -> watch; pass behavior and vitality -> open; then compose the trust posture with cell identity, boundary, vitality, need, offering, memory, and field fit to choose open/watch/wait/repair/rest/ask. Wellness passes with the concept counted and circulated.

ci_validation.notes: No remote PR checks have run yet for this branch.

deploy_validation.notes: No public HTTP surface changed. The Form stdlib and vision KB change will deploy through normal merge flow.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passes, but CI and deploy validation are pending until the branch is pushed and checked.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The body now carries nature-taught trust as an executable Form recipe and as a vision KB concept. A behavior row can resolve to open/watch/wait from trust evidence and whole-field vitality. Missing diversity or rest waits rather than watches. Cell importance then applies that posture to a cell's own identity, boundary, vitality, need, offering, memory, and field fit so the next move can also be repair, rest, or ask.
public_endpoints: No public HTTP endpoint; local Form stdlib recipes form/form-stdlib/nature-trust.fk and form/form-stdlib/cell-importance.fk plus concept docs/vision-kb/concepts/lc-nature-taught-trust.md.

Focused four-way Form proof: cell-importance-band -> 2047, fourth arm four-way, 0 divergent.
